summary: Midjourney announced Midjourney Medical, a full-body ultrasound scanner that uses a pool of water and 500,000 transducers to create a 3D map of the body in 60 seconds, without radiation or magnets. It processes 17 GB of data per second and costs a few dollars per scan. The first location will open in a San Francisco spa in 2027, initially providing body composition data while working toward FDA approval for diagnostics.

stories.title: news@alphasignal.ai — Midjourney skips imaging giants: 500K sensors, 60-sec body scan, $few
stories.text: Stay updated with today's top AI news, papers, and repos. AI companies are quietly rewriting what kind of company they are. Midjourney went from text-to-image to full-body medical scanner overnight. Anthropic went from chatbot to design system enforcer . The pattern? AI labs are eating adjacent industries whole, not just augmenting them. We're past "AI features" and into full product pivots. The real question isn't whether these bets work. It's whether anyone outside AI can keep up. In Partnership with · Today's Author Lior Alexander. Founder of AlphaSignal and former ML Engineer. Previously built ML systems at Iguazio, Guesty, Enphase, Mila. Top News Midjourney launches a new medical imaging division 26,349 Likes Midjourney, the company you know for turning text into images, just announced Midjourney Medical , a full-body scanner. Nobody saw this coming. Here is what it actually is. You step into a pool of water. Sound waves pass through your body from every angle. 60 seconds later , you have a 3D map of your entire body. No radiation, no magnets, just ultrasound. The specs are wild: 500,000 transducers (tiny sensors) firing sound waves through you simultaneously 17 gigabytes of data processed every second A few dollars per scan, not hundreds First location opens in a San Francisco spa in 2027 The goal is catching health problems early, before symptoms show up. Think of it like version control for your body , scan regularly, spot changes over time. They are starting with body composition data (fat, muscle, bone density) while working toward FDA approval for full diagnostics. Midjourney has never shipped a physical product before, so the 2027 timeline is the real test. Presented by Vanta The enterprise deal is ready. Is your SOC 2? The fastest-growing startups know that when customers ask for a SOC 2 report, they need to have it ready to go. That's where Vanta comes in. Used by over 16,000 global companies like Ramp, Cursor, and Harvey, Vanta helps you audit-ready quickly — and stay that way. The Vanta Agent runs in your background like a 24/7 GRC engineer, pulling evidence, drafting fixes, and answering questionnaires. Don't let compliance be the reason a deal slips. Watch the on-demand demo to see how Vanta works. Top Repo OpenCut is a free open-source video editor with 55K GitHub stars and no watermarks 23,605 Likes CapCut locks basic features behind a paywall, slaps watermarks on your exports, and uploads your footage to their servers. A group of devs got fed up and built OpenCut , a fully open-source alternative that just hit 55,000 GitHub stars . Here's what you actually get: Multi-track timeline editor with real-time preview, no watermarks, no subscriptions Runs in your browser, on desktop, and on mobile, all from one codebase Your files never leave your device, everything is stored locally MCP Server built in, meaning you can connect AI agents to automate editing tasks MIT license, so you can fork it, modify it, ship it in your own product The current version works today. A full rewrite in Rust (a faster, lower-level language) is in progress, adding a plugin system and scripting support. To try it: clone the repo, run bun install , then bun run dev . Done. Presented by AWS Two days of agentic AI at AWS Summit DC AWS Summit Washington , DC runs June 30–July 1 at Walter E. Washington Convention Center: 350+ sessions across agentic AI, AI infrastructure, and modernization. Real production builds, not slideware. Keynote from Dave Levy, VP, Worldwide Public Sector. Hands-on labs and direct access to AWS engineers. Top News Anthropic launches Claude Design to build UIs using your real design system 13,223 Likes Claude Design just got a big update, and the core idea is simple: stop letting AI invent your brand from scratch every time. The old problem? You'd prompt Claude Design to build a UI, and it would make up its own buttons, colors, and spacing. Every project looked slightly different. Now you can import your actual design system from a GitHub repo, a design file, or a raw upload. Claude builds with your real components , then checks its own output against your system before you even see it. Here's what's new and worth knowing: Import your design system once, stay on brand across every project Edit directly on the canvas by dragging, resizing, and aligning elements Use /design-sync in Claude Code to pull your design system into your terminal workflow Export to PDF, PowerPoint, Canva, Vercel, and more Shared usage limits with Claude Code, so less quota burn Find it at claude.ai/design on any paid plan. At Alpha Signal, our mission is to build a sharp, engaged community focused on AI, machine learning, and cutting-edge language models, helping over 200,000 developers stay informed and ahead. We're passionate about curating the best in AI, from top research and trending technical blogs to expert insights and tailored job opportunities. We keep you connected to the breakthroughs and discussions that matter, so you can stay in the loop without endless searching. We also work closely with partners who value the future of AI, including employers and advertisers who want to reach an audience as passionate about AI as we are. Our partnerships are based on shared values of ethics, responsibility, and a commitment to building a better world through technology.Privacy is a priority at Alpha Signal. Our Privacy Policy clearly explains how we collect, store, and use your personal and non-personal information. By using our website, you accept these terms, which you can review on our website. This policy applies across all Alpha Signal pages, outlining your rights and how to contact us if you want to adjust the use of your information. We're based in the United States. By using our site, you agree to be governed by U.S. laws. Looking to promote your company, product, service, or event to 250,000+ AI developers?
